hero.title: The Quran App for Every Muslim Family
hero.tagline:
Teach your kids, connect with your faith, and instill family values this Ramadan.
Authentic • Ad-Free • Family Friendly

goals_section.title: Set Your Quran Goals
goals_section.desc: Build a habit this Ramadan. Choose from 5, 10, 30, or 60 minutes daily goals. Track your streak and understanding.

listen_section.title: Listen to the Holy Quran
listen_section.desc: Experience the beauty of Quranic recitation by Mishary Rashid Al-Afasy. Listen online, repeat verses, and download Surahs for offline playback.

features_section.title: Powerful Features to Explore the Quran
features_section.subtitle: Smart tools to explore, understand, and reflect on the Quran effortlessly.
features_section.f1_desc: Read all 114 Surahs with beautiful Arabic text, multiple translations, and easy navigation
features_section.f2_desc: Listen to renowned Qaris with high-quality audio. Play in background while multitasking
features_section.f3_desc: Understand the structure and themes of each Surah with organized verse groupings
features_section.f4_desc: Access everything offline - no internet required after initial download
features_section.f5_desc: Compare different translations and tafseer side-by-side for deeper understanding
features_section.f6_desc: Save verses to custom collections — organize by themes, reflections, or reminders

reviews_section.title: What Users Are Saying
reviews_section.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of users worldwide on Google Play
reviews_section.rating_meta: Rated by real users on Google Play • 116 reviews
reviews_section.r1_text: "This Quran app is truly amazing and very easy to use. I really love the font style — it's clear, beautiful, and very comfortable to read. The revelation order of the Surahs gives a deeper perspective. May Allah reward the developers! 🌸"
reviews_section.r2_text: "Very nice Quran app. No ads and completely free. It has all the required and very nice extra features such as tafseer as well."
reviews_section.r3_text: "Impressive UI. Very simple to use. No Ads and easy to understand."
reviews_section.cert_desc: Easy Quran has been rigorously reviewed and certified by recognized Islamic scholars (Mufti Ibrahim Essa) to ensure 100% accuracy of the Arabic text, translations, and Islamic content.

faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.a1: Yes, Easy Quran is completely free to download and use with all features included.
faq_section.q2: Can I use Easy Quran offline?
faq_section.a2: Yes, after initial download, all content is available offline without internet connection.
faq_section.a3: English, Urdu, Arabic are available—with tafseer insights to deepen understanding.
faq_section.q4: Is Easy Quran app proofread or reviewed by scholars?
faq_section.a4: Yes. The Arabic Quran text of Easy Quran is reviewed and authenticated by qualified Islamic scholars. A verified Shariah Board Certificate (in English and Urdu) is also attached above on this page.
faq_section.a5: Yes. Easy Quran is completely ad-free. There are no banners, video ads, or pop-ups — ensuring a distraction-free and peaceful Quran reading experience.
faq_section.q6: Which scholar's tafseer does Easy Quran include?
faq_section.a6: Easy Quran provides tafseer from renowned scholars including Ibn Kathir, Maududi, and others — allowing you to compare explanations and understand verses deeply.
faq_section.q7: Can I create personal collections of verses?
faq_section.a7: Yes. You can save any verse and organize it into your own custom collections — such as patience, charity, motivation, family values, reminders, or spiritual reflections.
faq_section.q8: Does Easy Quran support topic-based browsing?
faq_section.a8: Yes. Easy Quran allows you to explore the Quran by topics such as charity, family values, justice, finance, patience, gratitude, social ethics, and many more.
faq_section.q9: Is Easy Quran the only app that classifies Ayahs by topics?
faq_section.a9: Yes. Easy Quran is currently the only Quran app that automatically organizes verses into meaningful topics such as charity, patience, gratitude, justice, family values, finance, and social ethics.
